name: easel-skills
description: Reusable agent skills for planning, prose quality, adversarial review, research, repo triage, release management, data quality, documentation, mapping, and execution hygiene.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable skills for planning, prose, research, review, Git, release, and data work.
interface.longDescription: Easel Skills packages portable agent skills for plan lifecycle orchestration, AI-slop reduction, source-backed research, structured critique, local Git state, release readiness, data quality rules, data documentation, and data mapping.
defaultPrompt: Use $plan-lifecycle to refine this plan and delegate specialist review.
Use $data-quality to generate validation rules from this schema.
